items.headline: Hart Trophy finalists for Most Valuable Player for 2025-26 announced by NHL
items.description:
Nikita Kucherov, Nathan MacKinnon and Connor McDavid were named finalists for the Hart Trophy on Friday.
The award is given annually to the NHL player voted most valuable to his team by the Professional Hockey Writers Association.
The winner will be announced at a later date.

items.headline: 2026 King Clancy nominee essay Seattle Kraken Joey Daccord
items.description: Editor’s Note: The King Clancy Memorial Trophy is presented annually to the NHL player who best exemplifies leadership qualities on and off the ice and has made a noteworthy humanitarian contribution in his community. Each NHL club nominates a player to be considered for this recognition, and each nominee has

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats leaders for 2025-2026 season
items.description:
NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, we will identify the leaders in key advanced metrics.
\---

items.headline: Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback for May 8 2026
items.description: The Stanley Cup Playoffs are in full swing and NHL.com has it all covered. Each day, we will present Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback, your one-stop shop for all the action. Here’s a look at where things stand on Friday, May 8:

items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers power play struggles continues in Game 3
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- The Philadelphia Flyers' struggles against the Carolina Hurricanes during the Eastern Conference Second Round could be encapsulated in a span of 2:45 late in the second period.

items.headline: Captain Jordan Staal does everything in Hurricanes Game 3 win
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- Amid the chaos of odd bounces, penalties and post-whistle scrums in Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Second Round on Thursday, Jordan Staal did what he always does and provided a steadying presence for the Carolina Hurricanes.

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Philadelphia Flyers game 3 recap May 7 2026
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- Jordan Staal and Andrei Svechnikov each had a goal and an assist for the Carolina Hurricanes, who are on the verge of advancing to the Eastern Conference Final following a 4-1 win against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 3 of the second round at Xfinity Mobile Arena on

items.headline: Noah Cates injury status update May 6 2026
items.description:
VOORHEES, N.J. -- Noah Cates will miss the remainder of the Eastern Conference Second Round for the Philadelphia Flyers because of a lower-body injury.
The center sustained the injury during a 3-2 overtime loss at the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 2 on Monday. He played 20:53, including 3:23 during overtime.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs began Saturday with the Carolina Hurricanes defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-0. The second round continued on Sunday with the Colorado Avalanche defeating the Minnesota Wild 9-6.

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks maturing fast entering Game 3 against Golden Knights
items.description:
ANAHEIM -- The Anaheim Ducks are learning on the fly and experiencing some intense on-the-job training in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
However, they are catching on quickly.

items.headline: Nick Sirianni, Cooper DeJean fire up Flyers fans before Game 3
items.description:
Nick Sirianni and Cooper DeJean were flying high at Xfinity Mobile Arena on Thursday.
The Philadelphia Eagles head coach and defensive back “ignited the orange” before Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Second Round between the Philadelphia Flyers and Carolina Hurricanes.

items.headline: Brett Kulak getting settled with Avalanche and solidifying defense
items.description:
DENVER -- Brett Kulak was just about settled into his place in Pittsburgh following his trade from the Edmonton Oilers when he got the call on Feb. 24: He was being traded to the Colorado Avalanche.

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres Rasmus Dahlin rewarded with Norris nomination in trying season
items.description: BUFFALO -- Rasmus Dahlin was destined for hockey greatness.

items.headline: Cole Caufield aims to regain scoring touch for Montreal Canadiens
items.description:
BUFFALO -- Cole Caufield is not trying to hide from his scoring woes.
Or, for that matter, talking about them in public.
